heroTagline: Strength training on your terms — free, open-source, built for real sessions.
storyP1: I built this because I was tired of gym apps that were either bloated with features I didn't need, locked behind subscriptions, or harvesting my data. I wanted to log sets, track progress, and get on with training — without the noise.
storyP2: So I built GymLogic: simple, fast, no-BS. It's free, it's open-source, and when you want help, AI can draft programs and workouts around your profile — you're always in control.
featurePwa: Works offline — install it like a native app
featureAi: AI-powered programs & workouts when you want a head start
featureFree: Free forever — no subscriptions, no ads
openSourceDescription: Licensed under MIT. The code is on GitHub — contributions, issues, and stars are welcome.
supportDescription: Love the app? A donation option is coming soon. In the meantime, star the repo or share it with a friend.
